businessName: Your Business Name (as shown on Google)

_help.businessName: Exact name of your Google Business Profile listing.
_help.placeId: Optional but STRONGLY recommended for reliable matching. Get it from a Places API lookup or a Place ID finder. Leave blank to match by name.
_help.center: Latitude/longitude of your business. In Google Maps, right-click your pin -> the lat,lng is at the top of the menu. This centres the grid.
_help.gridSize: Odd number. 9 = 9x9 (81 points), 13 = 13x13 (169 points). Cost = gridSize^2 SERP calls.
_help.spacingM: Metres between pins. 500 is a good default.
